case_title: CRAIG GOLD VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
RETURNED MAIL FROM POST OFFICE SENT TO DEFENDANT WARFIELD HOTEL-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED. (NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT)
PLAINTIFF FILED SC-105 (REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER).
RETURNED MAIL SENT TO CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO-"DOES NOT BELONG TO TAX COLLECTOR." NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRAIG GOLD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO WARFIELD HOTEL DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BARRED BY STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDERED ON APPLICATION FOR FEE WAIVER "GRANTED" IN PARTS (FILING PAPERS, SHERIFF & MARSHALL FEES), PER COMMISSIONER SLAVIT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WARFIELD HOTEL
